svg.title: What the tokenize step does at Guard 3
svg.desc: Tokenizer steps A-D with diamond and GPU all inside the boundary, plus token budget implication box.
svg.text: What the tokenize step does at Guard 3
Step A — frame comes in (sample content shown below)
"What is a fixed deposit interest rate?"
Step B — split into pieces (the tokens)
Step D — convert each piece to an integer ID (vocabulary lookup)
IDs → GPU only if guard passes
The practical implication — your token budget
